description: Only SequenceGUID values confirmed by a target-server in-game dump belong in entries. KindredExtract source/reference values remain pending until verified.

pendingReferenceSources.reason: Fallback SequenceGUID constants are reference candidates, not target-build verification.
Configured values must be checked against the running V Rising build before promotion.

entryShape.dumpSource: KindredExtract .dump eq/.dump p output or approved runtime capture
